core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Fintech precision with Cyberpunk atmospherics.
Emotion First: Every interaction must feel 'alive' via micro-interactions and glow.
Content is King: Data density for Admins, storytelling for Storefronts.
Dark Mode First Strategy: The 'Midnight Tech' theme is the flagship aesthetic.
anti_patterns: No solid flat colors without texture or noise.
No hardcoded hex values in components.

rules: All financial data, ID numbers, and code snippets must use JetBrains Mono.
Body text must use Inter for maximum legibility at small sizes.
Use 'tracking-tight' on all headings larger than 24px.

midnight_tech.name: Midnight Tech
midnight_tech.description: Cyberpunk-inspired deep dark mode with neon blue accents and glassmorphism.

slate_pro.name: Slate Pro
slate_pro.description: Clean, high-contrast professional light mode. The current default evolved.

ocean_deep.name: Ocean Deep
ocean_deep.description: Teal and Cyan dominant modern dark theme. Deep and aquatic.

themes.css_implementation_guide: The implementation must map Shadcn's HSL variables (e.g., --primary, --card) to these --aa-* variables dynamically or via a color utility helper, as Tailwind expects HSL for alpha transparency support. For the 'Midnight Tech' glassmorphism, use the alpha channel in the --aa-card variable.

common_styles.aa-card: bg-[var(--aa-card)] border border-[var(--aa-card-border)] backdrop-blur-xl shadow-lg rounded-xl

Button.style: h-11 px-8 rounded-full font-manrope font-semibold transition-all duration-300

Input.base: h-12 rounded-full border border-[var(--aa-border)] bg-[var(--aa-bg)]/50 px-4 transition-all

Sidebar.item: flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 rounded-lg transition-colors text-[var(--aa-muted)] hover:text-[var(--aa-text)] hover:bg-[var(--aa-surface)]

Table.header: bg-[var(--aa-surface)] text-[var(--aa-muted)] uppercase text-xs font-mono tracking-wider

recommendations: Wrap lists in 'motion.ul' and items in 'motion.li' using the staggered pattern.
Add 'layout' prop to cards in grids to animate sorting/filtering smoothly.

assets.grid_texture: background-image: linear-gradient(var(--aa-border) 1px, transparent 1px), linear-gradient(90deg, var(--aa-border) 1px, transparent 1px); background-size: 40px 40px; opacity: 0.03;

universal_guidelines.color_usage: Do NOT use direct hex codes in components. Always use 'var(--aa-*)'.
universal_guidelines.spacing: Use 'gap-6' or 'gap-8' for dashboard grids. Use 'p-8' for cards. 'p-4' is too tight.
universal_guidelines.testing: All interactive elements MUST have 'data-testid' attributes (kebab-case).

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Update index.css to include the utility classes defined in 'ui_components.common_styles'.
2. Implement a ThemeManager context that applies the selected preset's variables to the :root element.
4. Refactor the Sidebar to support the 'Midnight Tech' glassmorphism style.
5. Ensure the Storefront Product Grid uses the staggered animation pattern.
